original: Just how much does the Constitution protect your digital data?
translation_literal: 宪法究竟在多大程度上保护你的数字数据？

chunks.relation: 修饰谓语，询问保护的程度
疑问句中的谓语结构
作谓语 protect 的宾语

original: The Supreme Court will now consider whether police can search the contents of a mobile phone without a warrant if the phone is on or around a person during an arrest.
translation_literal: 最高法院现在将考虑，如果手机在逮捕期间在某人身上或周围，警察是否可以在没有搜查令的情况下搜查一部手机的内容。

chunks.english: whether police can search the contents of a mobile phone without a warrant
chunks.chinese: 警察是否可以在没有搜查令的情况下搜查一部手机的内容
chunks.relation: 作 consider 的宾语

chunks.english: the contents of a mobile phone
chunks.relation: 作 can search 的宾语

chunks.chinese: 在没有搜查令的情况下
chunks.relation: 说明搜查发生时缺少搜查令

chunks.english: if the phone is on or around a person during an arrest
chunks.chinese: 如果手机在逮捕期间在某人身上或周围
chunks.relation: 说明搜查行为成立的条件
说明条件从句中的时间背景

original: California has asked the justices to refrain from a sweeping ruling, particularly one that upsets the old assumption that authorities may search through the possessions of suspects at the time of their arrest.
translation_literal: 加利福尼亚州已经要求大法官们避免作出一项范围广泛的裁决，尤其是避免作出一项会推翻旧有假设的裁决，即当局可以在嫌疑人被逮捕时搜查他们的财物。

chunks.relation: 作 asked 的宾语

chunks.english: to refrain from a sweeping ruling
chunks.chinese: 避免作出一项范围广泛的裁决
chunks.relation: 补充说明要求大法官做的事
进一步说明 sweeping ruling 的具体类型
修饰 one

chunks.english: that authorities may search through the possessions of suspects at the time of their arrest
chunks.chinese: 即当局可以在嫌疑人被逮捕时搜查他们的财物
chunks.relation: 解释 old assumption 的具体内容

chunks.english: at the time of their arrest
chunks.relation: 说明搜查财物的时间

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 抽象名词 + that 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: that authorities may search through... 是同位语从句，解释 old assumption 的具体内容。

original: It is hard, the state argues, for judges to assess the implications of new and rapidly changing technologies.
translation_literal: 该州辩称，对于法官们来说，评估新的且迅速变化的技术的影响是困难的。

chunks.relation: 形式主语，真正主语由不定式结构承担
作系动词 is 后的表语
说明观点来源

chunks.english: for judges to assess the implications of new and rapidly changing technologies
chunks.chinese: 对于法官们来说评估新的且迅速变化的技术的影响
chunks.relation: 对应形式主语 It

chunks.english: of new and rapidly changing technologies
chunks.chinese: 新的且迅速变化的技术的
chunks.relation: 修饰 implications，说明影响的来源

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is + adj. + for sb. + to do sth.
sentence_patterns.explanation: It 是形式主语，真正主语是 for judges to assess the implications...。
the state argues 插入句中，说明观点来自加利福尼亚州，阅读时可先跳过。

original: The court would be recklessly modest if it followed California’s advice.
translation_literal: 如果法院听从加利福尼亚州的建议，法院将会是鲁莽地保守的。

chunks.relation: 作 would be 后的表语

chunks.chinese: 如果它听从加利福尼亚州的建议
chunks.relation: 说明主句判断成立的条件

original: Enough of the implications are discernable, even obvious, so that the justices can and should provide updated guidelines to police, lawyers and defendants.
translation_literal: 足够多的影响是可以看出的，甚至是明显的，因此大法官们能够并且应该向警察、律师和被告提供更新后的指导原则。

chunks.chinese: 可以看出的，甚至明显的
chunks.relation: 作系动词 are 后的表语

chunks.english: so that the justices can and should provide updated guidelines to police, lawyers and defendants
chunks.chinese: 因此大法官们能够并且应该向警察、律师和被告提供更新后的指导原则
chunks.relation: 说明表语所导致的结果
作 provide 的宾语
说明提供指导原则的对象

original: They should start by discarding California’s lame argument that exploring the contents of a smartphone — a vast storehouse of digital information — is similar to, say, going through a suspect’s purse.
translation_literal: 他们应该从抛弃加利福尼亚州站不住脚的论点开始，即查看智能手机的内容，一个数字信息的巨大仓库，类似于，比方说，翻查嫌疑人的钱包。

chunks.chinese: 通过抛弃加利福尼亚州站不住脚的论点
chunks.relation: 说明开始的方式

chunks.english: that exploring the contents of a smartphone is similar to going through a suspect’s purse
chunks.chinese: 即查看智能手机的内容类似于翻查嫌疑人的钱包
chunks.relation: 解释 argument 的具体内容

chunks.english: exploring the contents of a smartphone
a vast storehouse of digital information
chunks.chinese: 一个数字信息的巨大仓库
chunks.relation: 补充说明 smartphone 的性质
作 similar to 的比较对象
引出例子

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 抽象名词 + that 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: that exploring the contents... is similar to... 解释 argument 的具体内容。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 破折号/逗号插入补充说明
sentence_patterns.explanation: a vast storehouse of digital information 和 say 都是插入成分，主干是 exploring... is similar to going through...。

key_words.meaning: 站不住脚的，无说服力的

original: The court has ruled that police don’t violate the Fourth Amendment when they go through the wallet or pocketbook of an arrestee without a warrant.
translation_literal: 法院已经裁定，当警察在没有搜查令的情况下翻查被捕者的钱包或手提包时，他们并没有违反第四修正案。

chunks.english: that police don’t violate the Fourth Amendment
chunks.chinese: 警察并没有违反第四修正案
chunks.relation: 作 ruled 的宾语
作 violate 的宾语

chunks.english: when they go through the wallet or pocketbook of an arrestee without a warrant
chunks.chinese: 当他们在没有搜查令的情况下翻查被捕者的钱包或手提包时
chunks.relation: 说明没有违反第四修正案的情形

chunks.chinese: 在没有搜查令的情况下
chunks.relation: 说明翻查行为缺少搜查令

original: But exploring one’s smartphone is more like entering his or her home.
translation_literal: 但是，查看某人的智能手机更像是进入他或她的家。

chunks.relation: 连接前后句，表示转折

chunks.english: more like entering his or her home
chunks.chinese: 更像是进入他或她的家
chunks.relation: 作系动词 is 后的表语

original: A smartphone may contain an arrestee’s reading history, financial history, medical history and comprehensive records of recent correspondence.
translation_literal: 一部智能手机可能包含被捕者的阅读历史、财务历史、医疗历史以及近期通信的全面记录。

chunks.english: an arrestee’s reading history, financial history, medical history and comprehensive records of recent correspondence
chunks.chinese: 被捕者的阅读历史、财务历史、医疗历史以及近期通信的全面记录
chunks.relation: 作 may contain 的宾语
修饰 records，说明记录的内容

sentence_patterns.explanation: reading history, financial history, medical history and comprehensive records 并列作 contain 的宾语，阅读时要并列展开。

original: The development of “cloud computing,” meanwhile, has made that exploration so much the easier.
translation_literal: 与此同时，“云计算”的发展已经使那种查看变得容易得多。

chunks.relation: 修饰 development，说明发展的对象
说明句子与前文的时间关系
作 has made 的宾语
补充说明宾语 that exploration 的状态

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主语和谓语之间插入副词
sentence_patterns.explanation: meanwhile 插在主语和谓语之间，主干是 The development... has made...。

original: Americans should take steps to protect their digital privacy.
translation_literal: 美国人应该采取措施来保护他们的数字隐私。

chunks.relation: 作 should take 的宾语

chunks.chinese: 来保护他们的数字隐私
chunks.relation: 说明采取措施的目的

original: But keeping sensitive information on these devices is increasingly a requirement of normal life.
translation_literal: 但是，把敏感信息保存在这些设备上越来越成为正常生活的一项要求。

chunks.relation: 连接前后句，表示转折

chunks.english: keeping sensitive information on these devices
chunks.chinese: 把敏感信息保存在这些设备上

chunks.relation: 修饰谓语，说明变化趋势
作系动词 is 后的表语

original: Citizens still have a right to expect private documents to remain private and protected by the Constitution’s prohibition on unreasonable searches.
translation_literal: 公民仍然有权期待私人文件保持私密，并受到宪法对不合理搜查的禁止条款的保护。

chunks.relation: 修饰谓语，说明权利仍然存在
作 have 的宾语

chunks.english: to expect private documents to remain private and protected by the Constitution’s prohibition on unreasonable searches
chunks.chinese: 期待私人文件保持私密并受到宪法对不合理搜查的禁止条款保护的
chunks.relation: 修饰 right，说明权利内容
补充说明 private documents 的状态
作 expect 的宾语

chunks.english: by the Constitution’s prohibition on unreasonable searches
chunks.chinese: 由宪法对不合理搜查的禁止条款
chunks.relation: 说明受保护的依据

original: As so often is the case, stating that principle doesn’t ease the challenge of line-drawing.
translation_literal: 正如情况经常如此，陈述那个原则并不会减轻划线界定的挑战。

chunks.english: As so often is the case
chunks.relation: 修饰主句，说明常见情况
作 doesn’t ease 的宾语
修饰 challenge，说明挑战内容

sentence_patterns.explanation: As so often is the case 是固定的 as 结构，表示“情况常常如此”。

key_phrases.phrase: As so often is the case

original: In many cases, it would not be overly burdensome for authorities to obtain a warrant to search through phone contents.
translation_literal: 在许多情况下，对于当局来说，获得一张搜查令来搜查手机内容并不会过分繁重。

chunks.relation: 说明主句判断适用的范围
形式主语，真正主语由不定式结构承担
作 would not be 后的表语

chunks.english: for authorities to obtain a warrant to search through phone contents
chunks.chinese: 对于当局来说获得一张搜查令来搜查手机内容
chunks.relation: 对应形式主语 it
说明获得搜查令的目的

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is + adj. + for sb. + to do sth.
sentence_patterns.explanation: it 是形式主语，真正主语是 for authorities to obtain a warrant...。

original: They could still invalidate Fourth Amendment protections when facing severe, urgent circumstances, and they could take reasonable measures to ensure that phone data are not erased or altered while waiting for a warrant.
translation_literal: 当面临严重且紧急的情况时，他们仍然可以使第四修正案的保护失效，并且他们可以采取合理措施来确保手机数据在等待搜查令期间不被删除或更改。

chunks.relation: 作 invalidate 的宾语

chunks.chinese: 当面临严重且紧急的情况时
chunks.relation: 说明使保护失效的情形

chunks.english: and they could take reasonable measures
chunks.chinese: 并且他们可以采取合理措施
chunks.relation: 与前一分句并列

chunks.english: to ensure that phone data are not erased or altered while waiting for a warrant
chunks.chinese: 来确保手机数据在等待搜查令期间不被删除或更改
chunks.relation: 说明采取措施的目的

chunks.english: that phone data are not erased or altered
chunks.chinese: 手机数据不被删除或更改
chunks.relation: 作 ensure 的宾语
说明数据不被删除或更改的时间

sentence_patterns.explanation: when facing severe, urgent circumstances 省略了主语和 be 动词，可理解为 when they are facing...。
could still invalidate... 和 could take reasonable measures... 构成并列动作，后半部分又包含 ensure 后的宾语从句。

original: The court, though, may want to allow room for police to cite situations where they are entitled to more freedom.
translation_literal: 不过，法院可能想要留出空间，让警察引用他们有权获得更多自由的情形。

chunks.relation: 表示转折

chunks.english: to allow room for police to cite situations
chunks.chinese: 留出空间让警察引用情形
chunks.relation: 作 may want 的宾语

chunks.english: where they are entitled to more freedom
chunks.chinese: 他们有权获得更多自由的
chunks.relation: 修饰 situations

sentence_patterns.explanation: though 插在主语 The court 后面，表示转折，主干是 The court may want...。

original: But the justices should not swallow California’s argument whole.
translation_literal: 但是，大法官们不应该全盘接受加利福尼亚州的论点。

chunks.relation: 连接前后句，表示转折
作 swallow 的宾语
修饰 swallow，说明接受的程度

original: New, disruptive technology sometimes demands novel applications of the Constitution’s protections.
translation_literal: 新的、具有颠覆性的技术有时要求对宪法保护作出新的应用。

chunks.chinese: 新的、具有颠覆性的技术

chunks.english: novel applications of the Constitution’s protections
chunks.chinese: 对宪法保护的新的应用
chunks.relation: 作 demands 的宾语
修饰 applications，说明应用的对象

key_words.meaning: 颠覆性的，造成重大变化的

original: Orin Kerr, a law professor, compares the explosion and accessibility of digital information in the 21st century with the establishment of automobile use as a virtual necessity of life in the 20th.
translation_literal: 法律教授奥林·克尔把21世纪数字信息的爆炸式增长和可获得性，与20世纪汽车使用作为生活中实际必需品的确立相比较。

chunks.relation: 解释说明 Orin Kerr 的身份

chunks.english: the explosion and accessibility of digital information in the 21st century
chunks.chinese: 21世纪数字信息的爆炸式增长和可获得性
chunks.relation: 作 compares 的第一个比较对象
修饰 explosion and accessibility
说明数字信息变化发生的时间

chunks.english: with the establishment of automobile use as a virtual necessity of life in the 20th
chunks.chinese: 与20世纪汽车使用作为生活中实际必需品的确立
chunks.relation: 说明第二个比较对象

chunks.english: as a virtual necessity of life
chunks.chinese: 作为生活中实际必需品的
chunks.relation: 修饰 automobile use，说明其地位

sentence_patterns.explanation: a law professor 是 Orin Kerr 的同位语，解释其身份。
the explosion and accessibility of digital information 是并列名词结构，共同作为 compares 的第一个比较对象。

original: The justices had to specify novel rules for the new personal domain of the passenger car then; they must sort out how the Fourth Amendment applies to digital information now.
translation_literal: 大法官们当时不得不为乘用车这一新的个人领域规定新的规则；他们现在必须弄清楚第四修正案如何适用于数字信息。

chunks.english: The justices had to specify novel rules for the new personal domain of the passenger car then
chunks.chinese: 大法官们当时不得不为乘用车这一新的个人领域规定新的规则
chunks.relation: 分号前的第一分句
作 specify 的宾语

chunks.english: for the new personal domain of the passenger car
chunks.chinese: 为乘用车这一新的个人领域
chunks.relation: 说明规定规则的适用对象

chunks.english: they must sort out how the Fourth Amendment applies to digital information now
chunks.chinese: 他们现在必须弄清楚第四修正案如何适用于数字信息
chunks.relation: 与第一分句并列，形成过去与现在的对照

chunks.english: how the Fourth Amendment applies to digital information now
chunks.chinese: 第四修正案现在如何适用于数字信息
chunks.relation: 作 sort out 的宾语
作 applies to 的宾语

sentence_patterns.explanation: 分号连接过去和现在两个并列分句：had to specify... then 与 must sort out... now 形成对照。
